commands: vp migrate --no-interactive # a version-update defers legacy husky/lint-staged setup to --full
cat package.json # husky/lint-staged and prepare are left untouched
test -d .husky && echo '.husky directory exists' || echo 'No .husky directory' # .husky is kept
vp migrate --hooks --no-interactive # --hooks opts into migrating legacy husky/lint-staged
cat package.json # husky/lint-staged should be removed, prepare should be vp config
cat .vite-hooks/pre-commit # pre-commit hook should be rewritten
test -d .husky && echo '.husky directory exists' || echo 'No .husky directory' # .husky should be removed
